title: cuphea pinetorum
intro: Cuphea pinetorum, also known as Pine Cuphea, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and Central America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cuphea pinetorum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and fever. Traditionally, the plant has been used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be prepared by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or by extracting the active compounds using a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
